# Maribavir 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Maribavir 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Maribavir</strong> 目前有 <strong>35 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Maribavir 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：LIVTENCITY is indicated for the treatment of cytomegalovirus (CMV) infection and/or disease that are refractory (with or without resistance) to one or more prior therapies, including ganciclovir,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>bronchitis（87.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（79.1%）</li>
<li>bronchial neoplasm (disease)（77.8%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（76.2%）</li>
<li>filariasis（74.3%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（73.4%）</li>
<li>colonic lymphangioma（73.3%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（73.2%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（73.1%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（73.1%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（73.1%）</li>
<li>colonic neoplasm（73.0%）</li>
<li>cavernous hemangioma of colon（73.0%）</li>
<li>colon leiomyoma（72.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of cecum（72.9%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（72.7%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（72.7%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（72.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（71.8%）</li>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（71.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/maribavir/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
